mission.title: podman-container-tools: Rootless Podman won't work since version 3.1.0
mission.description: Rootless Podman won't work since version 3.1.0. This issue affects 11+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

**Description**

> This subject was initially discussed at https://bbs.archlinux.org/viewtopic.php?id=265140.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Rootless Podman won't work since version 3.1.0
steps.description:
https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/872 should be ready to merge, but https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/867 does not look like it's ready yet. Once both are, we can cut a fresh release of c/storage and get it vendored into Podman for a 3.1.1. In the meantime, anyone who can manually
```yaml
rootless_storage_path = "$HOME/.local/share/containers/storage"
```

steps.title: Confirm Rootless Podman won't work since version 3.1.0 is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/872 should be ready to merge, but https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/867 does not look like it's ready yet. Once both are, we can cut a fresh release of c/storage and get it vendored into Podman for a 3.1.1.

prerequisites.description: A working podman-container-tools installation or development environment.
